title: Arts Council of Northern Ireland client survey findings
body: "The survey presents key data on funded organisation workforce profiles (including gender and ethnicity), income and expenditure sources and activity and audience levels.  The data release underlines the Arts Council’s commitment to transparency and evidence-based decision-making. It also supports government, stakeholders, researchers, and the wider public in understanding how public funding is invested to strengthen the cultural sector.   There have been no changes to the method or classification of these statistics since the last publication. "
